Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:14px; padding:14px 16px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: Showcase · 99 · Hero Layout Demo

Label.name: cap
Label.text: `al.stackMode: layers` overlaps children in one cell. Each layer wrapper fills the whole cell, then positions content with `layerAlignItems` and `layerJustifyContent` (copy is bottom-left in row direction). The examples below confirm each layer by adding them one by one.

Panel.name: s1
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:10px; padding:12px 14px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: ① Background image only

Label.name: hint
Label.text: One image component in the root panel. Later steps layer additional content over the same grid cell.

Panel.name: demo
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:0; padding:0; minHeight:min(72vw, 420px); stackMode:layers; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-layers

Image.name: bg
Image.al: alignSelf:stretch; width:100%; minHeight:100%; flex:1 1 auto; layerZ:5; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch

Panel.name: s2
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:10px; padding:12px 14px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: ② Text + CTA layer (bottom left, tight vertical stack)

Label.name: hint
Label.text: Copy panel `al`: `layerAlignItems:flex-end`, `layerJustifyContent:flex-start` aligns it to the bottom-left. Inside, `gap:6px` and `justifyContent:flex-start` keep the vertical stack tight.

Panel.name: demo
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:0; padding:0; minHeight:min(72vw, 420px); stackMode:layers; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-layers

Image.name: bg
Image.al: alignSelf:stretch; width:100%; minHeight:100%; flex:1 1 auto; layerZ:5; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch

Panel.name: fg
Panel.al: layerZ:25; layerAlignItems:flex-end; layerJustifyContent:flex-start; layerPointerEvents:auto; layerPadding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,28px) clamp(20px, 5vh, 36px) clamp(16px,4vw,28px); padding:0; gap:6px; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:flex-start; fixedHeight:true; width:100%; stackClass:xa-al-banner-hero-fg xa-al-showcase-hero-fg-tight

Label.name: title
Label.text: Beyond The Horizon
Label.font: family:'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif; size:28; weight:800; lineHeight:1.05

Label.name: sub
Label.text: Beyond the limits, a new world unfolds. Start your next journey.

Panel.name: s3
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:10px; padding:12px 14px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: ③ Left/right arrow button layer

Label.name: hint
Label.text: `layerAlignItems:center` + `layerJustifyContent:space-between` places controls vertically centered at the left/right edges. Buttons remain clickable with `pointer-events:auto`.

Panel.name: demo
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:0; padding:0; minHeight:min(72vw, 420px); stackMode:layers; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-layers

Image.name: bg
Image.al: alignSelf:stretch; width:100%; minHeight:100%; flex:1 1 auto; layerZ:5; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch

Panel.name: fg
Panel.al: layerZ:25; layerAlignItems:flex-end; layerJustifyContent:flex-start; layerPointerEvents:auto; layerPadding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,28px) clamp(20px, 5vh, 36px) clamp(16px,4vw,28px); padding:0; gap:6px; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:flex-start; fixedHeight:true; width:100%; stackClass:xa-al-banner-hero-fg xa-al-showcase-hero-fg-tight

Label.name: title
Label.text: Beyond The Horizon
Label.font: family:'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif; size:28; weight:800; lineHeight:1.05

Label.name: sub
Label.text: Beyond the limits, a new world unfolds. Start your next journey.

Panel.name: arrowsRow
Panel.al: layerZ:40; layerAlignItems:center; layerJustifyContent:space-between; layerPadding:0; layerPointerEvents:none; direction:row; justifyContent:space-between; alignItems:center; padding:0 clamp(12px,3vw,18px); width:100%; fixedHeight:true

Panel.name: s4
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:10px; padding:12px 14px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: ④ Bottom control bar (indicator · 1/5 · play/pause)

Label.name: hint
Label.text: Do not place the black bar (`mkHeroDockBar`) directly as a layers child. Add one transparent chrome panel (`mkHeroDockChromeLayer`) and use vertical `justifyContent:flex-end` inside it to pin only the bar to the bottom. Increase the copy `layerPadding` bottom so it does not overlap the copy.

Panel.name: demo
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:0; padding:0; minHeight:min(72vw, 420px); stackMode:layers; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-layers

Image.name: bg
Image.al: alignSelf:stretch; width:100%; minHeight:100%; flex:1 1 auto; layerZ:5; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch

Panel.name: fg
Panel.al: layerZ:25; layerAlignItems:flex-end; layerJustifyContent:flex-start; layerPointerEvents:auto; layerPadding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,28px) clamp(56px, 12vh, 104px) clamp(16px,4vw,28px); padding:0; gap:6px; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:flex-start; fixedHeight:true; width:100%; stackClass:xa-al-banner-hero-fg xa-al-showcase-hero-fg-tight

Label.name: title
Label.text: Beyond The Horizon
Label.font: family:'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif; size:28; weight:800; lineHeight:1.05

Label.name: sub
Label.text: Beyond the limits, a new world unfolds. Start your next journey.

Panel.name: arrowsRow
Panel.al: layerZ:40; layerAlignItems:center; layerJustifyContent:space-between; layerPadding:0; layerPointerEvents:none; direction:row; justifyContent:space-between; alignItems:center; padding:0 clamp(12px,3vw,18px); width:100%; fixedHeight:true

Panel.name: dock
Panel.al: layerZ:55; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch; layerPadding:0; direction:column; justifyContent:flex-end; alignItems:stretch; gap:0; padding:0; width:100%; minHeight:100%; fixedHeight:true; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-dock-chrome

Panel.name: bar
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:center; gap:0; padding:0 clamp(16px,3vw,40px); width:100%; minHeight:48px; fixedHeight:true; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-dock

Panel.name: leftCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:center; alignItems:center; flex:0 0 auto; fixedHeight:true; padding:0

Panel.name: midCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:center; alignItems:center; flex:1 1 0; minWidth:0; fixedHeight:true; padding:0

Panel.name: rightCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:flex-end; alignItems:center; gap:8px; flex:0 0 auto; fixedHeight:true; padding:0

Panel.name: s5
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:10px; padding:12px 14px

Label.name: hdr
Label.text: ⑤ Complete (all layers composited)

Label.name: hint
Label.text: Same structure as ④. In production, bind only `layerZ`, animation, and slide index.

Panel.name: demo
Panel.al: autoHeight:true; gap:0; padding:0; minHeight:min(72vw, 420px); stackMode:layers; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-layers

Image.name: bg
Image.al: alignSelf:stretch; width:100%; minHeight:100%; flex:1 1 auto; layerZ:5; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch

Panel.name: fg
Panel.al: layerZ:25; layerAlignItems:flex-end; layerJustifyContent:flex-start; layerPointerEvents:auto; layerPadding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,28px) clamp(56px, 12vh, 104px) clamp(16px,4vw,28px); padding:0; gap:6px; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:flex-start; fixedHeight:true; width:100%; stackClass:xa-al-banner-hero-fg xa-al-showcase-hero-fg-tight

Label.name: title
Label.text: Beyond The Horizon
Label.font: family:'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif; size:28; weight:800; lineHeight:1.05

Label.name: sub
Label.text: Beyond the limits, a new world unfolds. Start your next journey.

Panel.name: arrowsRow
Panel.al: layerZ:40; layerAlignItems:center; layerJustifyContent:space-between; layerPadding:0; layerPointerEvents:none; direction:row; justifyContent:space-between; alignItems:center; padding:0 clamp(12px,3vw,18px); width:100%; fixedHeight:true

Panel.name: dock
Panel.al: layerZ:55; layerAlignItems:stretch; layerJustifyContent:stretch; layerPadding:0; direction:column; justifyContent:flex-end; alignItems:stretch; gap:0; padding:0; width:100%; minHeight:100%; fixedHeight:true; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-dock-chrome

Panel.name: bar
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:flex-start; alignItems:center; gap:0; padding:0 clamp(16px,3vw,40px); width:100%; minHeight:48px; fixedHeight:true; stackClass:xa-al-showcase-hero-dock

Panel.name: leftCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:center; alignItems:center; flex:0 0 auto; fixedHeight:true; padding:0

Panel.name: midCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:center; alignItems:center; flex:1 1 0; minWidth:0; fixedHeight:true; padding:0

Panel.name: rightCol
Panel.al: direction:row; justifyContent:flex-end; alignItems:center; gap:8px; flex:0 0 auto; fixedHeight:true; padding:0
